Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); drivers=d['Data']['driver'][0]['participants']; [print\(p['rnk'], p['playername'], p['teamname'], p['statvalue'], p['curvalue']\) for p in drivers]")
